---
title: "NIS2 Compliance in Sweden"
title-block-style: none
description: "NIS2 compliance services for Swedish businesses. Navigate MSB requirements, meet EU cybersecurity obligations, and protect your organization with expert guidance."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #81BD4A; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:70vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/datacenter-blue.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>NIS2 Compliance<br>in <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Sweden</span></h1>
    <p>Expert guidance for Swedish organizations navigating EU cybersecurity requirements under MSB oversight.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="ev-btn">Book a consultation</a>
      <a href="#affected" class="ev-btn-ghost">Who is affected?</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 10M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine (essential)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EUR 7M</div><div class="m-nl">Max fine (important)</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">Oct 2024</div><div class="m-nl">Transposition deadline</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">3,000+</div><div class="m-nl">Entities affected in SE</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WHO IS AFFECTED -->
<div class="m-s" id="affected" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Who is affected in Sweden?</h2>
    <p class="sub">Key sectors under NIS2 obligations with significant Swedish presence.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-lightning"></i><h3>Energy</h3><p>Vattenfall, E.ON Sweden, Fortum, wind farm operators, and electricity grid companies across the national power system.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse"></i><h3>Healthcare</h3><p>Regionerna (regional healthcare authorities), university hospitals, pharmaceutical companies, and medical technology providers.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-train-front"></i><h3>Transport</h3><p>SJ, regional transit operators, Trafikverket-connected systems, airports, port authorities, and shipping companies.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-telephone"></i><h3>Telecom</h3><p>Telia, Tele2, Tre, broadband providers, and digital communication infrastructure operators across Sweden.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><h3>Banking & Finance</h3><p>Riksbanken-connected institutions, commercial banks (SEB, Handelsbanken, Swedbank, Nordea), and payment platforms.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Data centers, cloud providers, DNS operators, IXPs, and Sweden's significant colocation and hosting industry.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-droplet"></i><h3>Water & Utilities</h3><p>Municipal water companies, wastewater treatment facilities, and district heating networks.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-gear"></i><h3>Manufacturing</h3><p>Automotive (Volvo, Scania), industrial equipment, electronics, and advanced manufacturing facilities.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MSB AUTHORITY -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/analyst-monitors.webp" alt="MSB cybersecurity oversight Sweden"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>The supervisory authority:<br>MSB.</h2>
        <p>In Sweden, <strong>MSB (Myndigheten for samhallsskydd och beredskap)</strong> — the Swedish Civil Contingencies Agency — is the primary authority for NIS2 implementation. MSB coordinates national cybersecurity policy, oversees compliance for critical sectors, and operates CERT-SE, Sweden's national CSIRT.</p>
        <p>Sweden's transposition of NIS2 builds on its existing information security framework, extending obligations to a significantly broader set of organizations. Affected entities must implement systematic risk management, report incidents within 24 hours, secure their supply chains, and ensure management accountability. Sector-specific supervisory authorities may also apply alongside MSB oversight.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">View NIS2 requirements</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOCAL CREDIBILITY -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.webp" alt="chen.ist operations in Stockholm"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>We understand<br>Sweden.</h2>
        <p>chen.ist has operations and partners in <strong>Stockholm</strong>, giving us direct insight into the Swedish business environment and regulatory expectations. We understand how Swedish organizations approach security — the emphasis on systematic processes, transparency, and trust.</p>
        <p>Sweden's strong tradition of digitalization means NIS2 affects a wide range of organizations, from global enterprises to fast-growing tech companies. Our team works with Swedish businesses to translate EU directive requirements into practical compliance programs that fit the Swedish way of working — structured, efficient, and thoroughly documented.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Schedule a consultation</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED SERVICES -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Related services</h2>
    <p class="sub">NIS2 compliance is most effective as part of a broader security strategy.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Full NIS2 assessments, gap analysis, and CISO as a Service for essential and important entities.</p><a href="/services/nis2/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>GDPR Compliance</h3><p>Data protection aligned with NIS2 security requirements. Many obligations overlap — address them together.</p><a href="/services/gdpr/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Cybersecurity</h3><p>Blue team operations, threat hunting, and security monitoring to meet NIS2 technical requirements.</p><a href="/services/cybersecurity/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to comply<br>with NIS2 in Sweden?</h2>
    <p>Connect with our Stockholm-based team for expert NIS2 guidance tailored to Swedish requirements.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free initial assessment &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> MSB-aligned &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Local presence
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
